title: Phase 4C: Seed realistic sample data (customers, products, orders)
description: Update seed script with realistic building supply data: customers with various credit profiles, lumber/building products with real categories, and orders in various states across the state machine.
steps: Update prisma/seed.ts with 20+ realistic customer records (contractors, builders, homeowners)
Include varied credit limits, payment terms, branch assignments, and contact info
Seed 50+ building supply products (lumber, hardware, roofing, siding, concrete, etc.)
Include realistic pricing, vendor assignments, and inventory balances
Seed 30+ orders across all states (DRAFT through COMPLETED, including ON_HOLD and CANCELLED)
Include order items, events, and audit trail for each order
Run prisma db seed and verify data integrity
